seo.title: Seb Jauslin PCC CPCC - Corporate Workshops & 1:1 Executive Coaching
seo.description: ICF and CTI certified leadership coaching and corporate workshops for organisations navigating promotion, restructure, pressure and performance.

hero.headline:
Your Best Leaders Got Promoted.
Now They’re Struggling — And So Are Their Teams.
hero.subtitle: Leadership transitions are the most expensive, under-supported moment in any organisation. Seb Jauslin helps companies fix that before it costs them.
hero.support: 1:1 executive coaching and corporate workshops for leaders navigating change, pressure and performance — in English, French and Spanish.

cost.headline: What’s Actually Happening Inside Your Organisation Right Now
intro: You promoted your strongest performer. Or you are navigating a restructure. Or a new leadership team is trying to find its footing while the business keeps moving.

Somewhere in that process, quietly and invisibly, things start to slip. Engagement scores dip. High performers grow restless. Teams pull inward. The leaders you are counting on start firefighting instead of leading.
This is not a people problem. It is a leadership support problem.

stats.label: of organisations report a significant leadership gap
reason employees leave is their direct manager
of annual salary can be lost in a failed leadership transition
lost globally each year through disengaged teams

cost.truth: Most senior leaders are promoted based on what they achieved as individuals, then left to figure out how to lead others on their own. That is not a strategy. That is a risk.

method.headline: This Is Where Seb Jauslin Comes In
intro: Seb knows this moment intimately because he lived it. After a career in law with the United Nations, the Swiss Federal Government and the Big Four, he was promoted without adequate support or training. The result was burnout severe enough to force him out of the role he had worked years to earn.
Today, Seb partners with purpose-driven organisations, including The Estée Lauder Companies, to close the leadership gap through high-impact 1:1 coaching programmes and focused corporate workshops.
method.quote: I promised myself that nobody would ever have to go through that alone in the corporate world.

architecture.headline: The BE > DO > HAVE Architecture™
architecture.intro: One signature methodology. Two powerful formats. Lasting organisational change.
architecture.body: Whether the engagement is a multi-month 1:1 coaching journey or a full-day corporate workshop, every intervention moves leaders through the same progression: from self-awareness, to capability, to lasting impact.

stages.name: BE
stages.label: Identity
stages.headline: Who you are as a leader
stages.body: Before a leader can influence a team, they must understand themselves: blind spots, triggers under pressure, motivation drivers and the fears that silently cap performance.
stages.coaching: 3-month 1:1 programme culminating in a 3D Personal Report.
stages.workshop: Experiential team work that builds self-awareness, psychological safety and honest conversation.

stages.name: DO
stages.label: Leadership
stages.headline: How you lead others
stages.body: Awareness becomes collective capability. Leaders learn to communicate across styles, influence without authority, give feedback without blame and navigate the conversations that build trust.
stages.coaching: 6-month 1:1 programme focused on stakeholder relationships, team performance and leadership presence.
stages.workshop: The engine of team progress, where teams stop talking past each other and start building together.

stages.name: HAVE
stages.label: Legacy
stages.headline: The culture and impact you create
stages.body: The highest expression of leadership connects individual ambition to organisational purpose, develops future leaders and builds a culture that sustains performance.
stages.coaching: 12-month 1:1 programme that strengthens strategic influence and includes a Behavioural Genetics DNA Report.
stages.workshop: Shared commitments and collective vision that turn a one-day event into cultural change that lasts.

proof.headline: Results That Speak to CFOs — Not Just HR

caseStudies.title: From Invisible to CFO
caseStudies.situation: A 42-year-old Global Director had given 12 loyal years to her employer, delivered exceptional results, and never received a promotion. By the time she came to Seb, she was ready to change careers entirely and move countries.
caseStudies.intervention: Over six months, Seb worked with her on visibility, confidence and the ability to translate her expertise into commercial language that senior leadership could hear. He coached her through high-stakes conversations and helped her communicate value in concrete business terms.
outcome: She was offered the CFO role
The company retained 12 years of institutional knowledge and client relationships
caseStudies.roi: Replacing a Global Director typically costs 150–200% of annual salary. The coaching investment was a fraction of that; the return was a retained, promoted CFO.
caseStudies.quote: I knew that Seb wants me to succeed and that my success matters to him as if his life depended on it. From the first session I felt as if I had known Seb for a very long time.
caseStudies.role: Director, Global Sanctions & Financial Crime Compliance

caseStudies.title: Leading Through a Crisis — The Estée Lauder Companies
caseStudies.meta: Corporate Workshop | Beauty & Cosmetics | 30-Person Leadership Team | Zurich, Switzerland
caseStudies.situation: The Estée Lauder Companies were in the middle of a significant restructure. Redundancies had been made, uncertainty was everywhere, and a 30-person leadership team needed more than a workshop. They needed a reset.
caseStudies.intervention: Seb designed and facilitated a full-day Leading Through Change workshop using the BE > DO > HAVE Architecture™. Participants reconnected with their individual strengths, processed the difficulty of the previous months and built shared commitments for the future.
outcome: Two employees were promoted to leadership roles within one year
Team performance returned to pre-restructure levels
Only one person left the team in the following 12 months
The Estée Lauder Companies commissioned a third workshop
caseStudies.roi: Each specialist departure can cost an estimated €30,000–€80,000 in recruitment, onboarding and lost productivity. Retaining a full team of 30 through disruption represents a return many times the workshop investment.
caseStudies.quote: Over the years, I’ve participated in many similar corporate workshops with different facilitators, but Seb brings a different meaning to what a workshop can be.
caseStudies.role: Key Account Leader, Estée Lauder Companies

pullQuotes.quote: Seb cuts straight to the heart of what’s holding you back. A game-changer for anyone’s professional journey.
He has the unique ability to make you feel at once safe and heard — whilst stretching you to think and behave in ways you never believed possible.
He is genuinely talented. The fact that he has gone through major career transitions himself made it even easier to trust him to guide me through mine.
I am again the captain of my ship and ready for any challenge life throws in my direction.

offer.headline: How We Work Together
offer.note: All engagements begin with a no-obligation 30-minute Discovery Call.

offers.title: The Leadership Transition Workshop Series
offers.body: Half-day or full-day experiential workshops for leadership teams navigating change, restructure or rapid growth. Available as standalone engagements or as a 3-part series. Delivered in Zurich, Geneva, London, Dubai or remotely.

offers.title: The Corporate Coaching Partnership
offers.body: A structured programme placing Seb as an embedded leadership coach for high-potential leaders or newly promoted executives. Engagements run 3, 6 or 12 months and align to the BE > DO > HAVE Architecture™.

offers.title: BE, DO and HAVE Programmes
offers.body: The BE, DO and HAVE programmes are available for senior professionals seeking structured growth at their own pace, with company sponsorship or independently.

whySeb.headline: What Makes Seb Different
body: Most leadership coaches teach frameworks. Seb has lived the transition and survived it.

His legal background with the United Nations, the Swiss Federal Government and the Big Four gives him the ability to read institutional politics and prepare leaders for the high-stakes conversations that shape careers.
His clients stay. The average 1:1 coaching relationship with Seb exceeds four years, and corporate clients like The Estée Lauder Companies return for multiple engagements year after year.

He is trilingual, globally experienced and holds credentials from two of the most rigorous coaching institutions in the world: ICF (PCC) and the Co-Active Training Institute (CPCC, Leadership Program Graduate).

image.alt: Seb Jauslin, PCC certified leadership coach

forbes.headline: Seb Jauslin — assertive leadership through coaching.

cta.headline: Let’s Find Out If We’re the Right Fit
cta.subtitle: A 30-minute Discovery Call costs nothing and changes everything. Seb will listen to where your organisation or leaders are right now, share what a tailored engagement could look like and give you a clear sense of the outcomes you can expect before you make any commitment.
cta.line: No pitch. No pressure. Just clarity.
